features: [Compatible Model]: Exclusively designed shockproof Case for iPad (A16) 11th Generation 11 inch 2025 & for iPad 10th Generation 10.9 inch 2022, Model (A3354 / A3355 / A3356 / A2696 / A2757 / A2777). NOT compatible with iPad Air/Pro series or any other model

[Frosting-Anti-Slip & Shockproof Case with Screen Protector]: This Case for iPad 11th/10th Generation is made up with built-in screen protector, hard plastic frame and TPU bumper. All-round protection design to keep your tablet from damages caused by accidental drops, shocks, bumps or scratches

[360° Rotating Stand & Hand Strap]: The sturdy kickstand can stably support your tablet at different angles, helping free your hands and allowing you to choose the most comfortable angle to read/ watch videos/ type/ draw. Rotating hand strap enables you to use case for iPad 11th/10th at any angle by one hand, which is very convenient during working, meeting or traveling

[Multifunctional Shoulder Strap & Built-in Pencil Holder]: The shoulder strap is adjustable and detachable, both kids and adults can use it to carry case for iPad 11th/10th Gen for outdoor activities. Built-in pencil holder helps store your pencil so it's always available when you need it
[Customer Service]: If you encounter any problems during product use or installation, please let us know immediately and we will help you solve the problem within 24 hours

Model: A3354 / A3355 / A3356 / A2696 / A2757 / A2777. Notice: iPad Pen is NOT included ! 3-in-1 Protective Case with Screen Protector Combined with built-in screen protector, hard PC front cover and TPU bumper, this case will provide all-round protection for your iPad. Easy access to all features of iPad 11th/10th Generation 2025/2022. Note: There is a blue film on the screen protector, please remove it before installation! Built-in Pencil Holder This iPad 11th/10th generation case is designed with a pen holder to help store your pen so it's always at hand when you need it and prevents it from getting lost. Notice please: We do not offer an iPad Pen. Adjustable and Foldable Kickstand 360-degree Rotating Stand The sturdy stand can rotate 360 degrees to provide stable support for your iPad at different angles, allowing you to free your hands and read, watch videos, type or draw at the most comfortable angle. The stand can be folded away when not in use. Protective Case for iPad 11th/10th Generation 11 inch/10.9 inch Suitable for daily entertainment, teacher-student teaching, conference and office use. Prevention of Drop Damages Full Body Protection Case for iPad 11th/10th Generation 11/10.9 inch 2025/2022 With the solid PC frame, scratch-resistant screen protector and TPU bumper, this iPad 11 inch/10.9 inch case can protect your iPad from damage caused by accidental drops, shocks, bumps or scratches. It is also anti-fingerprint and anti-dust, giving you a better using experience. Practical Hand Strap and Shoulder Strap 360° Rotating/ Adjustable Hand Strap The width of the hand strap can be adjusted to the size of your hand, allowing you to hold the iPad comfortably and securely. And it can rotate 360 degrees so you can choose the most comfortable angle to use your iPad. Detachable/ Adjustable Shoulder Strap Portable shoulder strap allows you to carry your iPad 11/10 case more conveniently during outdoor activities such as traveling, hiking, working, etc. You can also hang your iPad on the seatback using the shoulder strap so you can easily watch videos while driving in the car.
